title: Time-Lapse City Day-to-Night
summary: Rapid time-lapse of a downtown skyline transitioning from sunset to lit-up night.
prompt: A time-lapse from a high vantage point over a downtown city: the sky rolls from late-afternoon gold through deep magenta sunset, fades to violet twilight, and finally to inky night as thousands of building lights flicker on one by one. Streaks of car headlights weave through streets below. Smooth fast playback, locked-off camera, urban-photography color grade.
